title: Purchaser or mortgagee reliance on description
doc_html:
§5. Purchaser or mortgagee reliance on description

            Nothing contained in this Chapter shall require a purchaser or mortgagee to rely on a description which depends exclusively upon a particular state plane coordinate system.

            Acts 1985, No. 913, §1; Acts 2024, No. 626, §2.
doc_text:
§5.  Purchaser or mortgagee reliance on description
Nothing contained in this Chapter shall require a purchaser or mortgagee to rely on
a description which depends exclusively upon a particular state plane coordinate system.
Acts 1985, No. 913, §1; Acts 2024, No. 626, §2.
